Narrator: Measured adult narrator, neutral but ominous, steady pacing, clean diction, slightly detached, low dramatic weight, no background noise.
Villain_Cold: An old male voice, deep and resonant, gravelly and worn with age. British or Mid-Atlantic accent. Slow, cold, condescending delivery with controlled menace. Slight huskiness, heavy authority, quiet contempt, no background noise.
Villain_Bitter: An old male voice, deep and resonant, gravelly and worn with age. British or Mid-Atlantic accent. Slightly faster and more cutting than calm speech. Bitter, contemptuous, and emotionally bruised, with suppressed anger under the surface. No background noise.
Villain_Angry: An old male voice, very deep and worn, with a gravelly British or Mid-Atlantic accent. Controlled anger, sharper emphasis, harsher consonants, heavier breath, rising disdain, and flashes of venom without shouting. No background noise.
